x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions customers must meet to be offered the product

Comment:
Example:
Credit card available only to customers with income > €25,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Target Segment Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines the intended customer segments

Comment:
Example:
Premium savings account targeted at high-net-worth individuals

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pricing & Offer Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules governing promotional pricing or incentives

Comment:
Example:
0% interest for first 6 months on personal loans

x-enumeration-literals.name: Campaign Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions tied to marketing campaigns

Comment:
Example:
Bonus cashback available during holiday campaign period

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Disclosure Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Mandatory information shown during sales

Comment:
Example:
APR disclosure required before loan agreement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Channel Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines where the product can be sold

Comment:
Example:
Mortgage applications only available in branch and online banking

x-enumeration-literals.name: Onboarding Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Steps needed to complete customer acquisition

Comment:
Example:
KYC and identity verification required before account opening

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Process Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defined steps in the sales journey

Comment:
Example:
Credit card approval requires instant scoring before issuance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cross-Sell or Upsell Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for offering additional products

Comment:
Example:
Offer insurance when opening mortgage account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Marketing Content Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Required marketing materials or messaging

Comment:
Example:
Standard product fact sheet must be shown in all channels

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approval Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Internal approvals required before offering

Comment:
Example:
New pricing promotion requires compliance approval

x-enumeration-literals.name: Geographic Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Location-based sales restrictions

Comment:
Example:
Product available only in EU countries
